description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical can with a metallic top and bottom, featuring a vibrant and bold design. The main body is decorated with a neon green and hot pink leopard print pattern, with the front displaying a stylized cheetah face and the words 'CHEETAH CHUG' in black and pink. The lower front section prominently features the letters 'XE' in large, green font. One side of the can has a vertical black stripe with the text 'TRUE CHEETAH SWEAT' in yellow. The can's surface is glossy, reflecting light, and the overall appearance is eye-catching and energetic, likely intended to appeal to a youthful, urban audience. The can appears to be sealed and is likely used for containing a beverage.
description: A tall, glossy can with neon green and pink leopard print, featuring a cheetah face and bold branding. The design is energetic and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cheetah face, 'CHEETAH CHUG' branding, and large 'XE' letters on a neon green and pink background.
description_view_1: Side view reveals more of the leopard print pattern and partial branding, with less text visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a vertical black stripe with 'TRUE CHEETAH SWEAT' in yellow, surrounded by the leopard print.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the continuation of the leopard print and a partial view of the cheetah face.
attribute_brand_logo: A stylized cheetah face with the words 'CHEETAH CHUG' above and below it, located on the front of the can, in black and pink on a neon green background.
attribute_flavor_indication: No explicit flavor indicated; design uses energetic colors and animal imagery.
attribute_promotional_graphics: The cheetah face graphic on the front serves as a mascot; no other promotional graphics or special offers are visible.
